title: Solar Project Technical Specifications
description: Schema for the structured solar_project_specs.csv — the authoritative source for per-project identity, status, capacity, economic, geographic, ownership, and data-quality fields.

slug.description: Unique project slug. Existing wiki page slugs are preserved; unpaged records use stable feature IDs converted to kebab-case.

feature_id.description: GeoJSON feature ID linking this row to the solar_plants map layer.

label_title.description: Display title from the map popup/card.

project_group_slug.description: When multiple CSV rows represent blocks/units of the same project, this slug groups them (e.g. bidur-trishuli-solar-25mwp).

procurement_stage.description: Where the project sits in the procurement pipeline.

is_operating.description: Boolean flag for quick operating/non-operating filtering.

capacity_mwp.description: Nameplate/installed capacity in MWp (DC). Canonical solar unit.

capacity_mw.description: Nameplate/installed capacity in MW (AC where available). Compatibility/cross-reference field.

tariff_npr_kwh.description: Awarded or operating PPA tariff in NPR/kWh.

expected_annual_generation_gwh.description: Expected or design annual generation in GWh/year.

province.description: Nepal province name. Left blank in v1 pending authoritative derivation.

substation.description: Named grid substation for interconnection (tender awards primarily).

resource_zone.description: Solar resource zone per solar-resource-geography-nepal framework. Blank when unassigned.

siting_archetype.description: Solar siting archetype. Blank when unassigned.

precision_label.description: Free-form precision label (e.g. 'DoED coordinate midpoint', 'District/substation anchor, not parcel coordinate').

location_basis.description: Free-form explanation of how the display coordinates were derived.

source_note.description: Provenance note for this row's data (e.g. 'DoED Power Plants :: Solar table, updated Mar 29 2026').

source_slug.description: Optional reference to a wiki/pages/sources/ page slug. Blank where no clean source page match exists.

last_updated.description: Date when this row's data was last verified or updated.
